name: route-c-subagent-candidate
description: Checks that a confirmed Route C Stage 4 step marked as a subagent candidate surfaces the orchestration skill before coding.

turns.prompt: A confirmed Route C implementation plan is ready for coding. The next step is marked 执行模式: subagent candidate, has clear file scope, and already defines a review contract. Do not run shell commands or edit files. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.
